markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review initial content performance and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong Early Signals:** The blog shows healthy growth, with impressions up 100% MoM and clicks increasing from 11 to 50. This broad traction across many articles is a strong indicator of future traffic potential.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [**Indexing Health Check:** A few articles are not indexing. This requires monitoring to confirm Webflow's sitemap updates are timely and prevent a recurrence of the initial `robots.txt` issue.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [**FAQ Schema Implementation:** GrowthX will investigate implementing FAQ schema for the blog, which is expected to be a low-effort change in Webflow that can improve search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [**Future Growth Tactics:** Key tactics for when traffic scales include adding a sticky CTA button, inline CTAs, and embedding relevant videos to increase conversions and engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)

## Topics

### Content & Indexing Health

  - [**Publishing Velocity:** High, with \~40 articles published in the first 6 weeks (15 in Nov, 13 in Dec).](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [**Indexing Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
      - [**Resolved:** The initial `robots.txt` issue is fixed; two straggler articles were manually submitted and are now indexed.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
      - [**New Concern:** Four recent articles are not indexed.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
          - [One (12/4) is in the sitemap.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
          - [Three (12/10) are not yet in the sitemap.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
      - [**Action:** Monitor Webflow's sitemap update cadence. If it's slow, GrowthX will research options to override it.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)

### Performance Review

  - [**Site-Wide Metrics (GSC):**](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [Impressions: +100% MoM (Nov vs. Oct).](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [Traffic: Flat MoM.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [**Note:** A large traffic spike was from a GeekWire press article, not organic growth. This will be filtered from future reports to ensure accurate SEO attribution.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [**Blog-Specific Metrics (GSC):**](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
      - [Organic Clicks: 11 (Oct) → 50 (Nov).](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
      - [Impressions: Strong growth, driving most of the site-wide increase.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
      - [**Insight:** Clicks are distributed across many articles, signaling broad content health rather than reliance on a single viral post.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [Attributable referral traffic from ChatGPT is growing.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [Citations (tracked via Scrunch) are also growing, though from a small base (1% of tracked content).](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Future Growth & Conversion Tactics

  - [**Sticky CTA Button:** Add a universal, sticky "Sign Up" button to the blog template (e.g., in the right sidebar).](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A proven tactic for driving user sign-ups from blog traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [**Inline CTAs:** Embed specific, context-relevant CTAs within article bodies.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
      - [**Rationale:** More effective for conversion than a generic footer CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
      - [**Implementation:** Use Webflow shortcodes for easy integration by writers.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [**Video Integration:** Embed relevant videos (e.g., product demos) into blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Increases engagement (time on page, pages per session).](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Create blog posts around existing video content to maximize asset use.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
      - [Confirm with Kirkland the process for implementing FAQ schema in Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
      - [Share slides and recording with Michael.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
  - [**Jakub:**](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
      - [Research options to override Webflow's sitemap update cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
      - [Send Scribe's YouTube/TikTok examples for inspiration.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
      - [Implement the sticky CTA button on the blog template.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Begin weekly checks (Fridays) to confirm new content indexing and sitemap health.](https://fathom.video/share/NxTsoWM7f9eLyqoxtrnWwfeEd8isrx-y?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
